dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
What should users be able to do?
create tasks, assign them, and track progress
Do users need login or authentication?
yes, each user should have an account

functional: The system shall allow users to sign in with individual accounts.
The system shall allow users to create tasks.
The system shall allow managers to assign tasks.
The system shall allow users to track task progress.
non_functional: The system shall load dashboards quickly.
The system shall protect team data from unauthorized access.
